children.name: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Stand
children.characters: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Standard Users (server also rejects with 403).

children.name: Account: Acme · page target < 1.5 s, API
children.characters: Account: Acme · page target < 1.5 s, API p95 < 150 ms [OPERATOR §Q14]

children.name: precedence: download > convert > analyze
children.characters: precedence: download > convert > analyze > research > reply · retry is idempotent (single-claim — never double-processes) [§3.3]

children.name: Stat cards + panels render token-tinted
children.characters: Stat cards + panels render token-tinted skeletons; static under reduced-motion.

children.name: No channels yet — Thready reads channels
children.characters: No channels yet — Thready reads channels you add.

children.name: Never a blank pane: icon + one-line reas
children.characters: Never a blank pane: icon + one-line reason + primary action.

children.name: Page-level thready-error with retry; fie
children.characters: Page-level thready-error with retry; field-level errors stay inline.

children.name: Falls back to polling; progress bars fre
children.characters: Falls back to polling; progress bars freeze at last known value, never reset.

children.name: Dead-lettered jobs surface in the queue
children.characters: Dead-lettered jobs surface in the queue with an idempotent retry [§3.3].

children.name: Helix Development attribution is locked
children.characters: Helix Development attribution is locked — it persists under any white-label.
